title: surface-opt P10 — dashboard safe editing
summary: This feature delivery hardens the dashboard file-editor modal inside DashboardPage. Every open starts read-only with an explicit Edit affordance, save intent routes through a unified diff review before any POST /api/file write, and guarded pipeline-owned path segments block confirm-save with an in-modal error. Review…
planning_context: handoff.handoff_note: Index links active work ship artifacts, archived pipeline reports, and implementation surface. After human acceptance, run pan advance with the feature index artifact to transition to complete.
review.spec_contracts_note: No contracts/ directory under feature folder; review used behavioral delta coverage only.
intake.human_approval_note: Spec ratified at plan advance per state.json advanceHistory intake→plan event.
archival_policy: Durable feature memory stores the compact index and machine-checkable contracts only. Full specs, plans, delivery reports, generated evidence, and run artifacts are intentionally omitted; use git history or .pan/archive paths for forensic reconstruction.
